description: A panoramic view through draped green curtains showing a fantastical cityscape combining architectural styles from multiple eras. A Gothic church spire rises at the left, a massive pyramid dominates the center background, and a classical temple with columns extends at the right. A waterway runs through the center. In the foreground, a figure reclines on a platform beside ornate columns, apparently dreaming this vision. The sky is warm and golden. The composition is grandiose and idealized.
